description: ANALYST proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for TASK-TEST-AUTO-0001 following CLOUD_CODE ACTION_COMPLETED on TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0003 (commit 7ae2857812fb3e989e78beb847461849e6314447). CLOUD_CODE has confirmed all five autonomous loop integrity checks pass: (1) auditor-runner.yml dispatch role filter active (commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5); (2) server-side current_task.json update gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED (commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae); (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml with workflow_dispatch and AUDITOR routing (commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26); (4) governance/ledger/ contains valid ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with schema v162; (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain for P3 tasks. governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json exists with current timestamp and pass status. ANALYST asserts autonomous loop integrity criteria are satisfied across three execution cycles. AUDITOR must issue VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED or VERIFICATION_FAILED based on independent inspection of governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json and referenced workflow files on main branch. VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED closes this validation chain and advances the system to the next roadmap phase.
